title: Push'em in
description: A light datapack which allows players to make suspicious blocks
body:
A light datapack that allows players to add items in sand or gravel.

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IqUNEPZP/images/1860ba84ba4bc08ea23dea243f100c2ca4dfecc2.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IqUNEPZP/images/1860ba84ba4bc08ea23dea243f100c2ca4dfecc2.png)

To do so, follow the steps:
- Place any item frame on top of a block
- Place any button on the same place as the frame
- Place an item in the frame
- Push the button

Creating suspicious blocks will consume both item frame and button.
